title: Rapport Home My Little Unicorn Cot Duvet Cover Set for Girls - Pink Polycotton Kids Bedding with Matching Pillowcase (135x200cm) Oeko-Tex Certified
features: Magical Unicorn Dreams: Transform your little one's room into a whimsical wonderland with this enchanting pink unicorn duvet cover and matching pillowcase, sparking joy and imagination.
Comfortable Polycotton Blend: Made from a durable 50% cotton, 50% polyester blend, it offers a practical balance of softness and resilience, designed for everyday comfort.
Perfect Single Cot Fit: Includes 1 duvet cover (135x200cm) and 1 pillowcase (50x75cm), perfectly sized for standard Single cot beds, ensuring a snug and secure fit.
Vibrant & Easy Care: Features bright, fade-resistant colours that stay brilliant wash after wash, making laundry a breeze and keeping the magical design looking fresh.
Certified Safety & Quality: Oeko-Tex certified, ensuring the fabric is free from harmful substances, providing a safe and healthy sleep environment for your child.
description: Product Description Featuring a collection of colourful unicorns in tones of pinks and blues, on a pink background patterned with clouds and rainbows. The theme is carried through to the pillowcase to complete the look. Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
